children.heading: Guarantee of premiums and interest by the United States
children.label: a Guarantee of premiums and interest by the United States

children.heading: Guarantee
children.label: 1 Guarantee
children.text: Payment of premiums, and interest on premiums at the rate specified in , which become due on a policy under the protection of this subchapter is guaranteed by the United States. If the amount guaranteed is not paid to the insurer before the period of insurance protection under this subchapter expires, the amount due shall be treated by the insurer as a policy loan on the policy.section 3976 of this title

children.heading: Policy termination
children.label: 2 Policy termination
children.text: If, at the expiration of insurance protection under this subchapter, the cash surrender value of a policy is less than the amount due to pay premiums and interest on premiums on the policy, the policy shall terminate. Upon such termination, the United States shall pay the insurer the difference between the amount due and the cash surrender value.

children.heading: Recovery from insured of amounts paid by the United States
children.label: b Recovery from insured of amounts paid by the United States

children.heading: Debt payable to the United States
children.label: 1 Debt payable to the United States
children.text: The amount paid by the United States to an insurer under this subchapter shall be a debt payable to the United States by the insured on whose policy payment was made.

children.heading: Collection
children.label: 2 Collection
children.text: Such amount may be collected by the United States, either as an offset from any amount due the insured by the United States or as otherwise authorized by law.

children.heading: Debt not dischargeable in bankruptcy
children.label: 3 Debt not dischargeable in bankruptcy
children.text: Such debt payable to the United States is not dischargeable in bankruptcy proceedings.

children.heading: Crediting of amounts recovered
children.label: c Crediting of amounts recovered
children.text: Any amounts received by the United States as repayment of debts incurred by an insured under this subchapter shall be credited to the appropriation for the payment of claims under this subchapter.
